title: Format a Date String
scenario: Write a prompt that takes a date string in the format 'dd-mm-yyyy' and formats it into the format 'dd-mm-yyyy HH:mm:ss'. The input date string may be in different formats (e.g., 'dd/mm/yyyy', 'dd.mm.yyyy'). The output should be the formatted date string. The LLM should handle different date formats and ignore any invalid dates.
constraints: Must be under 20 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: The code should be syntactically correct and valid JavaScript code.
The code should adhere to the constraints provided (JavaScript solution and under 20 lines of code).
The code should correctly format the date string into the required format.
